summary: Completed testing of ClickFlow v3 enhanced Linear-style task manager. Backend APIs fully functional (100% pass rate) including new bug attachment endpoints. Theme system, user profile dropdown, and authentication working. Navigation issues prevented full frontend feature testing.

fixed_issues.issue: PydanticBase import error causing server restart

ui_bugs.issue: Login gets stuck on 'Please wait...' intermittently

integration_issues.flow: Navigation to Sprint Board and Bug List
integration_issues.issue: Inconsistent navigation to project-specific pages, preventing full feature testing

passed_tests: All CRUD operations (projects, tasks, bugs, comments)
User profile dropdown (View Profile, Settings, Dark Mode, Sign Out)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix login form intermittent 'Please wait...' issue and improve navigation routing to Sprint Board and Bug List pages. All backend functionality is working correctly. Theme system and user profile features are fully functional.
